title: Automated Processes Path
description: Build fluency in Automated Processes inside Machine Learning Frameworks by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: AutoML
steps.summary: Automated machine learning, which involves automating the process of building and training models. It sits inside Machine Learning Frameworks / Automated Processes. Compare it with MLJAR AutoML and H2O AutoML. It opens into AutoML NLP and H2O AutoML.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: AutoML (Automated Machine Learning)

It sits inside Machine Learning Frameworks / Automated Processes. Start after AutoML and Machine Learning. It opens into Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) Frameworks and Automated Machine Learning (AutoML) for Tabular Data.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.
